articles.title_en: Reigning champion Argentina escapes with remarkable World Cup victory over Egypt
articles.title_ru: Reigning champion Argentina escapes with remarkable World Cup victory over Egypt
articles.full_en: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal.

articles.title_en: Workers' Party MPs warn against over-reliance on mega transport projects
articles.title_ru: Workers' Party MPs warn against over-reliance on mega transport projects
articles.preview_en: During a debate on the future of transport, Workers' Party MPs questioned Singapore's port and airport expansion plans, the 2016 sale of Neptune Orient Lines and the pace of the country's autonomous vehicle rollout.
